name: cepa
description: Compound engineering: full task orchestration (gated or autonomous), persona plan review before build, 11 review agents (8 roster + 3 signal-dispatched) with confidence-scored findings, solution documentation, batch-first triage, the hands-off /cepa:lfg pipeline, a scheduled residual sweep, PR-feedback resolution, an optional graphify grounding provider, and an optional OB1 cross-repo brain provider. Framework-agnostic via cepa.local.md.
